name: Plot Listing
title: Plot Listing HTML5 Website Template
description: Real estate listing directory template with a modern Bootstrap 5 design. Features a preloader, sticky header with WOW slide-down animation, and a prominent hero banner with search form containing area dropdown, location input, price range selector, and search button. Category icons row below the search. Popular Categories section uses a tabbed interface with left sidebar category menu and right content area. Recent Listings section displays property cards in an Owl Carousel. Multi-page structure with category, listing, and contact pages.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with strong heading hierarchy

layoutDetails: Multi-page directory layout (4 HTML pages). Hero with search form and category icons. Tabbed category browser with sidebar menu. Card-based listing grids with Owl Carousel.
visualStyle: Clean directory/marketplace design with card-based listings. Tomato red accent for CTAs and badges. White cards with subtle shadows. Category icons with circular backgrounds.

name: Real Dynamic
title: Real Dynamic
description: Real estate single-page template with a parallax hero section featuring a large property image background and centered headline. Navigation bar with brand logo collapses on mobile. Content sections include property introduction with descriptive text, a featured properties grid with image cards showing property details, and a customer testimonials carousel powered by Slick slider. Each property card displays an image, title, and brief description. The testimonials section uses a dark background with client quotes in a sliding carousel. Clean, modern layout with generous whitespace and a professional real estate aesthetic.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif Lato font with comfortable reading size

layoutDetails: Full-width sections stacked vertically. Parallax background hero, centered text blocks, property cards in responsive grid. Testimonials in full-width dark band with carousel.
visualStyle: Modern real estate with parallax imagery, clean white spaces, professional typography, and subtle color accents. Dark testimonial section provides visual contrast.

name: Simple House
title: Simple House Template
description: Real estate single-page template with a clean, modern design focused on property listings. Features a top navigation bar with brand logo, a hero section with a large background image and property search or call-to-action overlay. Content sections include Featured Properties with image cards showing property details (bedrooms, bathrooms, area), an About section with company information, Services section describing real estate offerings, a Testimonials area with client reviews, and a Contact section with a form. Clean white backgrounds with minimal accent colors. Font Awesome icons for property features. Responsive grid layout with property cards that reorganize on smaller screens.

typography.style: Open Sans with clean readability, professional for real estate context

layoutDetails: Top navbar with hero section. Property cards in responsive grid with detail icons. About and services in standard Bootstrap grid. Contact form centered. Responsive breakpoints.
visualStyle: Clean modern real estate with orange accent, white backgrounds, property card grid with feature icons, and professional typography. Minimal and focused on listings.

name: Moso Interior
title: Moso Interior -  HTML CSS Template
description: Interior design e-commerce template with Bootstrap 5. Hero with fullscreen background, search form with product name and price range dropdown. About with story text and two offset images. Opening hours display. Shop with product cards showing images, star ratings, and prices. Owl Carousel for products. Reviews section. Contact with form, Google Map, and address. Navbar with dropdown for shop sub-pages. Multi-page with listing and detail pages.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with light body weight and bold headings.

layoutDetails: Single-page main layout with multi-page shop structure. Bootstrap 5 grid. Fixed navbar with dropdown. Fullscreen hero with search form. Product cards with Owl Carousel.
visualStyle: Elegant interior design template with warm photography, product cards with star ratings. Red and green accent colors on white background.
